description:
The krb5-workstation package can be removed with the following command: 
$ sudo dnf remove krb5-workstation
rationale:
Kerberos is a network authentication system. The <tt>krb5-workstation</tt> package contains the basic
Kerberos programs (<tt>kinit</tt>, <tt>klist</tt>, <tt>kdestroy</tt>, <tt>kpasswd</tt>).
ocil:
Run the following command to determine if the krb5-workstation package is installed: 
$ rpm -q krb5-workstation
fixtext:
The krb5-workstation package can be removed with the following command: 
$ sudo dnf remove krb5-workstation
srg_requirement: The krb5-workstation package must not be installed on Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.
title: Uninstall krb5-workstation Package
